products.name: Pilot Operated Diaphragm Type Solenoid Valve (NC)
products.description: High-flow pilot operated diaphragm solenoid valve, normally closed. Ideal for air, water, and light oil applications with reliable sealing and low power consumption.

products.name: Pilot Operated Diaphragm Type Solenoid Valve (NO)
products.description: Normally open pilot operated diaphragm solenoid valve designed for continuous duty applications. Suitable for industrial automation systems.

products.name: Pilot Operated Piston Type Steam Valve
products.description: Heavy-duty piston operated solenoid valve for steam applications. Designed to handle high temperatures and pressures in industrial environments.

products.name: Direct Acting 2/2 Way Solenoid Valve (NC/NO)
products.description: Compact direct acting 2/2 way solenoid valve available in both NC and NO configurations. Suitable for low flow applications with fast response time.

products.name: Direct Acting 3/2 Way Solenoid Valve (NC/NO)
products.description: Versatile direct acting 3/2 way solenoid valve for directional control applications. Available in universal, normally closed, and normally open configurations.

products.name: Dust Collector Valve (Pulse Jet Angle Type)
products.description: High-performance pulse jet dust collector valve for filter cleaning applications in cement, steel, and chemical plants. Robust construction for demanding environments.

products.name: Gas Solenoid Valve (UGS Series)
products.description: Specialized gas solenoid valve certified for natural gas, LPG, and other gaseous media. Meets international safety standards with leak-proof design.

products.name: Pneumatic Rack & Pinion Actuator
products.description: High-torque rack and pinion pneumatic actuator for quarter-turn valve automation. Double acting and spring return models available.

products.name: Ball Valve (Fully Bore / Reduced Bore)
products.description: Precision-engineered ball valves available in full bore and reduced bore designs. Suitable for on-off and control applications across industries.

products.name: Butterfly Valve (Wafer / Lug Type)
products.description: High-performance butterfly valves in wafer and lug type configurations. Ideal for isolation and flow control in large diameter pipelines.

products.name: Angle Seat Valve (Piston Operated)
products.description: Heavy-duty angle seat valve with piston operation for steam, condensate, and high-viscosity fluids. Reliable sealing and long service life.

products.name: Air Cylinder (ISO / Compact Series)
products.description: High-quality pneumatic air cylinders in ISO and compact series. Double acting, single acting, and through-rod variants available.

products.name: Pneumatic Directional Control Valve (DCC Series)
products.description: Compact pneumatic directional control valves for precise air flow management. Available in 5/2, 5/3, and 3/2 configurations with solenoid or manual pilot.

products.name: PTFE Diaphragm Solenoid Valve
products.description: Chemically resistant PTFE diaphragm solenoid valve for handling corrosive fluids and aggressive chemicals. Ideal for chemical processing and pharmaceutical industries.

products.name: High Pressure Solenoid Valve
products.description: Rugged high-pressure solenoid valve rated for hydraulic and pneumatic systems up to 210 bar. Suitable for heavy industrial applications.

products.name: Explosion Proof Solenoid Valve
products.description: ATEX and PESO certified explosion-proof solenoid valves for hazardous area installations. Safe operation in flammable gas and dust environments.

testimonials.name: Mr. Quentin Law
testimonials.text: Exceptional product quality and timely delivery. CLIVO's solenoid valves have significantly improved our automation system reliability. Highly recommended for industrial applications.

testimonials.name: Mr. James Mitchell
testimonials.text: We have been using CLIVO pneumatic actuators for over two years now. The performance has been outstanding with zero maintenance issues. A trusted partner for our operations.

testimonials.name: Mr. David Chen
testimonials.text: The technical support and after-sales service from CLIVO is remarkable. They helped us select the right valves for our chemical processing plant. Excellent engineering support.

testimonials.name: Mr. Ahmed Hassan
testimonials.text: CLIVO's explosion-proof solenoid valves met our stringent safety requirements for oil and gas applications. The ATEX certification gives us complete confidence in their products.

testimonials.name: Mr. Thomas Weber
testimonials.text: Precision engineering at its finest. The PTFE diaphragm valves from CLIVO have performed flawlessly in our pharmaceutical manufacturing lines. German quality standards met with Indian efficiency.

industries.name: Oil & Gas
industries.description: CLIVO provides rugged solenoid valves and actuators for upstream and downstream oil & gas operations. Our explosion-proof and high-pressure solutions meet API and ATEX standards for safe and reliable flow control in the most demanding environments.

industries.name: Power Generation
industries.description: From thermal to renewable power plants, CLIVO's steam valves and pneumatic actuators deliver precise control for turbine cooling, fuel handling, and emission control systems with exceptional durability and zero-leakage performance.

industries.name: Food & Beverages
industries.description: CLIVO's sanitary diaphragm valves and stainless steel solenoid valves meet FDA and EHEDG standards for food and beverage processing. Our hygienic designs ensure contamination-free operation in dairy, brewery, and beverage production lines.

industries.name: Chemical & Pharmaceuticals
industries.description: Our PTFE-lined and corrosion-resistant solenoid valves are engineered for aggressive chemical media and pharmaceutical-grade applications. CLIVO valves provide precise dosing, isolation, and control in critical processing environments.

industries.name: Marine & Offshore
industries.description: CLIVO supplies marine-grade solenoid valves and pneumatic systems designed to withstand saltwater corrosion and harsh offshore conditions. DNV and Lloyds approved solutions for ballast control and engine room automation.

industries.name: Irrigation
industries.description: High-flow, low-power solenoid valves for agricultural and landscape irrigation systems. CLIVO's irrigation valves offer reliable performance with minimal maintenance, ensuring efficient water management for large-scale farming operations.

company.address: Ankur Industrial Complex, Shapar (Veraval) 360024, Dist: Rajkot, Gujarat, India
